name: Final Exam Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the unsweetened baking chocolate and butter together.
2. Stir the melted mixture into a bowl with sugar.
3. Mix in the eggs.
4. Add flour and vanilla extract to the mixture.
5. Fold in the miniature marshmallows, chopped nuts, semisweet chocolate chips, and half of the M&Ms.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 9x13-inch pan (9 by 13 inches).
7. Sprinkle the remaining M&Ms evenly over the top of the brownies.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-45 minutes, or until set.
